issue.title: Extend the community kitchen's operating hours
issue.description: The shared community kitchen currently runs 3 days a week and members are turned away. There is broad appetite to extend it — the open question is how, given the labor it takes to staff and clean a busier kitchen. This issue is expected to need a round of refinement.

context.historical: Kitchen opened 2023; demand has roughly doubled; turn-aways logged every open day this quarter.
context.ecological: Marginal ecological impact; mostly an energy + cleaning-water question, well within budget.
context.resources: Equipment is sufficient; the binding resource is volunteer labor-hours for cooking and cleaning.
context.labor: About 60 volunteer labor-hours/week are realistically sustainable without burning people out.
context.dependencies: The kitchen underpins the node's shared-meals program and reduces individual cooking load.

proposals.label: Open 7 days a week on a full volunteer rota
proposals.summary: Run the kitchen every day, staffed by an expanded volunteer rota.

proposals.label: Stay at 3 days but add a waitlist
proposals.summary: Keep current hours; manage demand with a booking waitlist.

proposals.label: Hire two paid part-time cooks
proposals.summary: Bridge-step option: extend hours by paying two part-time cooks instead of relying on volunteers.

constraints.name: labor_budget
constraints.message: Staffing burden exceeds the sustainable volunteer-hour budget.

constraints.name: accessibility_floor
constraints.message: Changes must not reduce equitable access to shared meals.

intake.author: stillwater:devon
intake.text: We turn people away every open day — three days a week isn't enough for the demand.

intake.author: stillwater:maya
intake.text: We turn members away constantly; three days just doesn't meet the need anymore.

intake.author: stillwater:sam
intake.text: I'm all for more hours, but who staffs and cleans it? We can't burn out the volunteers.

intake.author: stillwater:beatrice
intake.text: The shared meals are what bind us — more access would be wonderful if it's sustainable.

intake.author: stillwater:tomas
intake.text: Energy and water for a busier kitchen are fine within budget; labor is the real question.
